news.title: Leading home builder says the Iran war is already hurting housing market
news.summary: KB Home shares were under pressure on Wednesday after saying it’s already seeing prospective buyers deterred by the war as the Los Angeles home builder cut its full-year guidance.

news.title: Iran war volatility is pushing retail investors to sell stocks, but they aren’t leaving the market entirely
news.summary: Retail investors are gaining exposure to the market beyond single stocks.

news.title: Iran war may further 'chill' an already frozen job market, economist says
news.summary: The war injects additional uncertainty for businesses, leading them to hit pause on hiring.

news.title: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
news.summary: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.

news.title: Oil prices fall as Iran signals safe passage for ‘non-hostile’ ships through Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump that Washington and Tehran are "in negotiations right now" and indicated Iran is keen to reach a peace agreement.

news.title: It’s not just oil and gas. The Strait of Hormuz blockage is rattling another vital commodity
news.summary: “I'm a lot more concerned about the current crisis than I was when Russia-Ukraine happened four years ago,” one fund manager told CNBC.

news.title: How the Iranian war may lead to  the last days of the petrodollar
news.summary: “A world that becomes self-sufficient in defense and energy could also be a world that holds less dollar reserves,” says a Deutsche Bank analyst.

news.title: How the Iran war is changing the way countries think about renewables
news.summary: The fallout from the sprawling Middle East conflict is expected to represent a watershed moment for the energy transition.

news.summary: Trump said he decided to back off from his recent threat to order strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure "based on the fact we're negotiating."

news.title: A bad Treasury auction is offering a glimpse into the anxiety on Wall Street over the Iran war
news.summary: Wall Street jitters about the Iran war spilled over Tuesday into a vital part of U.S. financial markets that typically hum along without a hitch.
